description:
**CopyParty** is a fast, privacy-focused file sharing server using a local-first, single-file architecture, ensuring full control over data without cloud dependencies. Its intuitive interface supports offline use, with cross-platform compatibility and multi-protocol access, delivering a secure, efficient file management experience, ideal for users seeking direct data ownership and a lightweight solution.

The app's core features include accelerated resumable uploads (via the up2k protocol), ensuring reliable large file transfers, and automatic deduplication to optimize storage. It helps users organize folders and media effortlessly, with a web-based file manager that includes a built-in media indexer and thumbnail generator for quick previews. Fine-grained permission controls allow specific user access rules. The "upload-while-downloading" feature enhances sharing efficiency, and the zero-dependency design ensures it runs on almost any hardware.

It integrates multiple access protocols, including HTTP, WebDAV, FTP, and TFTP, supporting connections from standard web browsers, dedicated file clients, and legacy hardware (such as PSP). The app supports Docker and Python for deployment, simplifying setup across various server environments. It facilitates seamless access to local files without complex configuration. Community documentation enhances usability, and the app's simple operation and high flexibility deliver a modern local file service solution.

**Key Features:**
- Privacy-focused local file sharing
- Zero-dependency single-file architecture
- Accelerated resumable uploads
- Multi-protocol support (HTTP, WebDAV, FTP, etc.)
- Cross-platform compatibility
- Media indexing and streaming
- Smart deduplication
- User permission management

**Learn More:**
- [CopyParty GitHub Repository](https://github.com/9001/copyparty)
author: CopyParty

releaseNotes.en_US:
- v1.20.13 adds .hidden support for cosmetic directory-listing filtering.
- Thumbnail pregeneration and dotfile visibility in shares were added.
- Fixes include thumbnails on older OSes without JXL support, new-version alert permissions, mkdir blocking, nohtml/noscript behavior on the web root, and share dotfile handling.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- v1.20.13 adds .hidden support for cosmetic directory-listing filtering.
- Thumbnail pregeneration and dotfile visibility in shares were added.
- Fixes include thumbnails on older OSes without JXL support, new-version alert permissions, mkdir blocking, nohtml/noscript behavior on the web root, and share dotfile handling.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- v1.20.13 aggiunge il supporto .hidden per il filtraggio cosmetico directory-listing.
- Sono state aggiunte la pregenerazione delle miniature e la visibilità dei file di punti nelle condivisioni.
- Le correzioni includono miniature sulle versioni precedenti di OSes senza supporto JXL, autorizzazioni di avviso new-version, blocco di mkdir, comportamento nohtml/noscript nella radice Web e gestione dei dotfile condivisi.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- v1.20.13 legger til .hidden-støtte for kosmetisk directory-listing-filtrering.
- Pregenerering av miniatyrbilder og synlighet av punktfiler i delinger ble lagt til.
- Rettelser inkluderer miniatyrbilder på eldre OSes uten støtte for JXL, new-version varslingstillatelser, mkdir-blokkering, nohtml/noscript-adferd på webroten og delt dotfilhåndtering.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- v1.20.13 增加了 .hidden 支持，用于外观层面的目录列表过滤。
- 新增了缩略图预生成，以及在分享中显示 dotfile 的能力。
- 修复内容包括旧系统缺少 JXL 支持时的缩略图、新版本提醒权限、mkdir 阻止、Web 根目录的 nohtml/noscript 行为，以及分享中的 dotfile 处理。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- v1.20.13 は、見た目上のディレクトリ一覧フィルタリング向けに .hidden サポートを追加します。
- サムネイルの事前生成と、共有内での dotfile 表示が追加されました。
- 修正には、JXL サポートがない古い OS でのサムネイル、新バージョン通知の権限、mkdir ブロック、Web ルートの nohtml/noscript 動作、共有内の dotfile 処理が含まれます。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- v1.20.13은 디렉터리 목록의 시각적 필터링을 위한 .hidden 지원을 추가합니다.
- 썸네일 사전 생성과 공유에서 dotfile 표시 기능이 추가되었습니다.
- 수정 사항에는 JXL 지원이 없는 이전 OS의 썸네일, 새 버전 알림 권한, mkdir 차단, 웹 루트의 nohtml/noscript 동작, 공유의 dotfile 처리가 포함됩니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- v1.20.13 ajoute la prise en charge de .hidden pour le filtrage cosmétique des listes de répertoires.
- La prégénération des miniatures et la visibilité des fichiers dotfile dans les partages ont été ajoutées.
- Les correctifs couvrent les miniatures sur les anciens systèmes sans prise en charge JXL, les permissions d'alerte de nouvelle version, le blocage de mkdir, le comportement nohtml/noscript à la racine Web et la gestion des dotfiles dans les partages.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- v1.20.13 ergänzt .hidden-Unterstützung für kosmetisches Filtern von Verzeichnislisten.
- Thumbnail-Vorbereitung und Dotfile-Sichtbarkeit in Freigaben wurden hinzugefügt.
- Korrekturen betreffen Thumbnails auf älteren Systemen ohne JXL-Unterstützung, Berechtigungen für Versionshinweise, mkdir-Blockierung, nohtml/noscript-Verhalten im Web-Root und Dotfile-Behandlung in Freigaben.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- v1.20.13 lägger till .hidden-stöd för kosmetisk directory-listing-filtrering.
- Förgenerering av miniatyrbilder och synlighet av punktfiler i delningar lades till.
- Fixningar inkluderar miniatyrbilder på äldre OSes utan JXL-stöd, new-version varningsbehörigheter, mkdir-blockering, nohtml/noscript-beteende på webbroten och hantering av dela dotfile.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το v1.20.13 προσθέτει .κρυφή υποστήριξη για καλλυντικό φιλτράρισμα directory-listing.
- Προστέθηκε προδημιουργία μικρογραφιών και ορατότητα dotfile σε κοινόχρηστα στοιχεία.
- Οι διορθώσεις περιλαμβάνουν μικρογραφίες σε παλαιότερα OSes χωρίς υποστήριξη JXL, δικαιώματα ειδοποίησης new-version, αποκλεισμό mkdir, συμπεριφορά nohtml/noscript στη ρίζα ιστού και χειρισμό κοινόχρηστων αρχείων dotfile.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- v1.20.13 dodaje .skrivenu podršku za kozmetičko directory-listing filtriranje.
- Dodana je predgeneracija sličica i vidljivost dotfilea u dionicama.
- Popravci uključuju sličice na starijem OSes bez podrške JXL, dopuštenja upozorenja new-version, blokiranje mkdir-a, ponašanje bez html/noscripta na korijenu weba i dijeljenje rukovanja dotfileom.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- v1.20.13 adiciona suporte . hidden para filtragem cosmética directory-listing.
- Foram adicionadas a pré-geração de miniaturas e a visibilidade do dotfile nas partilhas.
- As correções incluem miniaturas em OSes mais antigos sem suporte para JXL, permissões de alerta new-version, bloqueio de mkdir, comportamento nohtml/noscript na raiz da web e manipulação de partilha de dotfile.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- v1.20.13 добавляет скрытую поддержку косметической фильтрации directory-listing.
- Добавлены предварительная генерация миниатюр и видимость точечных файлов в общих папках.
- Исправления включают миниатюры на более старых версиях OSes без поддержки JXL, разрешения на оповещения new-version, блокировку mkdir, поведение nohtml/noscript в корневом веб-сайте и обработку общих точечных файлов.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- v1.20.13, kozmetik directory-listing filtrelemesi için .hidden desteği ekler.
- Paylaşımlarda küçük resim ön oluşturma ve nokta dosyası görünürlüğü eklendi.
- Düzeltmeler, JXL desteği olmayan eski OSes üzerindeki küçük resimleri, new-version uyarı izinlerini, mkdir engellemeyi, web kökünde nohtml/noscript davranışını ve paylaşım nokta dosyası işlemeyi içerir.

tips.before_install:
## Default Account

- Username: casaos
- Password: casaos

## Modify Username and Password

To modify the default username and password, you can configure it by mapping the `/cfg/` path and adding a `copyparty.conf` configuration file in that directory.

For specific configuration, please refer to: [example](https://github.com/9001/copyparty/blob/hovudstraum/docs/example.conf)

title: CopyParty
